title: Accounting of Disclosures — Registry vs EHR-Logged Disclosures

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk Enterprise / HEC, Splunk DB Connect (2686)
spl:
index=privacy sourcetype="hipaa:disclosure_log" earliest=-30d
| stats count by disclosure_id, PAT_ID, recipient_class
| join type=left PAT_ID [
    search index=epic sourcetype="epic:disclosure_export" earliest=-30d
    | stats latest(_time) as epic_export by PAT_ID ]
| where isnull(epic_export) AND recipient_class IN ("LawEnforcement","Insurance","Employer")
| table disclosure_id, PAT_ID, recipient_class, count
value: Reconciles disclosure events recorded in the accounting of disclosures repository with interface and manual disclosure logs so patients receive accurate histories.
implementation: (1) Define authoritative system of record; (2) fix integration gaps when join misses; (3) legal review before patient-facing export.
visualization: Table (missing reconciliations), Column chart (disclosures by class).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
